title: Uranium
description: Replaces any sort of golden food with uranium. (Golden carrot, apples)
body:
# Can't say uraniyum without yum!
_Not finished, im yet to find a way to replace the file names.
If you find a way to replace the item names, feel free to direct message me on discord (buvtar). 
My first resource pack :)_
**Replaces the following items:**
- Golden Carrot - Uranium Fuel Rods
- Golden Apple - Bottle Of Uranium
- Enchanted Golden Apple - Enchanted Bottle Of Uranium
![yummers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/214bafa8c781e3d5cd2c1dd27126f0c0efdcc8bb.png)
